title: chore(observability): restore polar_event and crypto_event datasource files
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Dusting off the archives
gist.blurb: Restored some historical data source configurations to keep our deployment pipelines happy and our archives intact.
gist.summary: Restored the Polar and crypto event datasource configuration files to match the live Tinybird environment.
gist.impact: This resolves deployment warnings and ensures historical data is preserved without blocking unrelated infrastructure updates.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot and the monitor robot organizing old dusty files or archives in a cozy storage room, representing the preservation of historical data sources.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor robot organizing glowing data files in a dusty but warm archive room. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor robot organizing glowing data files in a dusty but warm archive room.
